final_prompt.prompt:
Create a technical exploded-view illustration of a Sony A7 camera showing all internal and external components labeled (all in-image text in Spanish).

Style/medium: needs a technical diagram aesthetic — references in the spirit of 1960s NASA engineering cutaways, vintage camera repair manuals, modern iFixit teardown illustrations; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be exploded-view layout with all components separated along axis lines to show assembly relationship
Subject: must include all camera parts with their names labeled:
  Body components: sensor, shutter mechanism, mirror box, LCD screen, EVF (electronic viewfinder), rear dial, front dial, mode dial, shutter button, grip, battery compartment, SD card slot, hot shoe, lens mount
  Internal electronics: main circuit board, image processor, battery, flex cables, ribbon connectors
  Mechanical parts: shutter blades, aperture mechanism, stabilization unit
Scene/backdrop: must be clean neutral background typical of technical diagrams
Lighting/mood: needs a clear instructional atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: needs a technical illustration surface treatment — exact line weight / cross-hatching is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all part names in Spanish: "sensor", "obturador", "pantalla LCD", "visor electrónico", "disco modo", "botón disparador", "empuñadura", "compartimento batería", "ranura tarjeta SD", "zapata flash", "montura objetivo", "placa circuito", "procesador imagen", "batería", "cables flexibles", "estabilizador imagen"
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Spanish by default; must preserve accurate Sony A7 camera anatomy; all component labels must be clearly readable and pointing to correct parts
Avoid: must avoid cluttered overlapping labels; must avoid incorrect component placement
